title: Upgrade to Claude Opus 4.7 as default planner/scanner model
source_context: User reported Opus 4.7 release and asked Rick to integrate features. Model aliases used across orchestrate.py:633, prometheus.py:336,360, delegate.py:1311, meeseeks.py:514, explain.py:418. argparse --model choices are restricted to [opus,sonnet,haiku] in several places.
description: Anthropic released Opus 4.7 on 2026-04-16. It outperforms 4.6 on agentic coding (+13%), 3x production task completion, has 1M context at standard pricing, new tokenizer, and better file-system memory usage. Rick's core commands (plan, scan, delegate) should default to opus-4-7 model alias. Update: (1) orchestrate.py claude_prompt default, (2) prometheus.py claude_scan default, (3) delegate.py --model choices to include 'opus-4-7', (4) config.json default_model to 'opus-4-7' for planning tickets, (5) agent cards using 'opus' alias (no change needed if claude CLI resolves 'opus' to latest). Also update SKILL.md docs and .cto/config.json.
proposed_changes: Add 'opus-4-7' and 'sonnet-4-6' to the --model argparse choices across delegate.py, prometheus.py, meeseeks.py, explain.py. The claude CLI already accepts full model IDs. Keep 'opus' as backwards-compat alias. Update claude_prompt/claude_scan defaults to 'opus-4-7' for Rick-level tasks.
